messages.content: Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'A person with snowboard in air with head above snow and legs bent behind, and shadow on snow covered ground, near mogul peaked piles, with another person in distance and some trees, against clear blue sky.'.

1. person has snowboard
2. person is in air
3. person has head above snow
4. person has legs bent behind
5. person's shadow is on snow covered ground
6. person is near mogul peaked piles
7. person is with another person in distance
8. person is against clear blue sky
9. person is near some trees

Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'A person with snowboard in air with head above snow and legs bent behind, and shadow on snow covered ground, near mogul peaked piles, with another person in distance and some trees, against clear blue sky.'.

1. subject: person, relation: has, object: snowboard
2. subject: person, relation: is in, object: air
3. subject: person, relation: has head, object: above snow

7. subject: person, relation: is with, object: another person
8. subject: person, relation: is against, object: clear blue sky

Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'Three walkers, in colorful winter gear, stride up a cleared path with ski poles attached to their person and also holding skis over their shoulders, along a snow bank with large snow-covered evergreens.'.

1. subject: Three walkers
   relation: stride up
   object: a cleared path

2. subject: Three walkers
   relation: in
   object: colorful winter gear

3. subject: Three walkers
   relation: have attached
   object: ski poles to their person

4. subject: Three walkers
   relation: also holding
   object: skis over their shoulders

5. subject: Three walkers
   relation: are along
   object: a snow bank

6. subject: snow bank
   relation: has
   object: large snow-covered evergreens

Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'An image show a left-hand view of a rose with white and fuschia petals and a right hand view of a girl on a cell-phone, sporting a trendy bag and mini, with white hair, bisected with a fuschia stripe.'.

relation: show
object: left-hand view

relation: sporting
object: a trendy bag

relation: sporting
object: a mini (skirt/dress)

relation: with
object: white hair

Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'In the first picture a boy is flipping his skateboard, in the second picture is skating and lifting the board slightly off the ground, and in the third he is jumping into the air onto the skateboard.'.

1. subject: In the first picture
   relation: a boy is flipping
   object: his skateboard

2. subject: In the second picture
   relation: is skating and lifting
   object: the board slightly off the ground

3. subject: In the third picture
   relation: he is jumping into the air onto
   object: the skateboard
